title: Renewal notices
subtitle: Platform WhatsApp to clinics when their plan is about to expire.
schedule_hint: Automatic delivery daily at 09:00 (7 and 1 days before expiry).
empty: No renewal notices have been sent yet.

whatsapp.title: Platform WhatsApp (Orvae)
whatsapp.description: Number used to send subscription expiry notices to clinics.
whatsapp.disabled: WhatsApp gateway is not active on the server. Check OPENWA_* in .env.
whatsapp.disconnect_description: Automatic renewal notices will stop until you connect a number again.
whatsapp.test_description: Verify the platform session can send WhatsApp.
whatsapp.test_default_message: Hello, this is a test from VetSaaS (Orvae platform). Renewal notices are working.
whatsapp.scan_qr: Scan with WhatsApp on your phone
